setup: Hero-aura regime pair, battle 2 of 2: 1 Lv 1.0 Infantry attacker led by Gatot vs 1 FC1 T6 Marksman defender led by Vulcanus (MM panels aura-boosted to A+1049.5). Identical troops to the 16:24:13 battle; adding Vulcanus flips the outcome from a 150-turn attacker victory to a 6-turn attacker defeat.

assumptions: Gatot S2 King's Bestowal triggers == battle rounds (Stage-4 verified)
Vulcanus cross-check consistent: S3=2 -> turns in [6,8]; S2=1 -> turns in [6,11]; both contain 6

stats_capture.notes: same Gatot-aura'd Infantry loadout as the 16:24 battle

hero_skills.name: Gatot Skill 1
hero_skills.effect: own Infantry Defense buff (Mueller copy level unconfirmed; Alpaca L2 = +12%)

hero_skills.name: King's Bestowal
hero_skills.effect: fires once per attack; grants Infantry a shield with protection = Attack x pct for 1 turn (Alpaca L2 = 12%)

hero_skills.name: Royal Legion
hero_skills.effect: instills fear: -10% enemy Attack, once at battle start (Royal Legion Lv.2 tooltip, Martin 2026-07-18)

stats_capture.notes: MM panels include Vulcanus's aura (+873.3/+873.3/+118.1/+21.6 over the 16:24 no-hero loadout); matches the known Alpaca NoAlliance Vulcanus-led loadout (E-NIF R11/R12)

hero_skills.name: Vulcanus Skill 1
hero_skills.effect: -4% enemy Troops Attack, once at battle start (L1 scale; level not shown)

hero_skills.name: Vulcanus Skill 2
hero_skills.effect: +20% damage every 6th attack event of its side (L1 scale; level not shown)

hero_skills.name: True Strike
hero_skills.effect: per proc (turns 3,6,9,...): -12% enemy Infantry/Lancer Defense for 3 turns AND +12% own Marksmen's Attack for 1 turn (L1 scale; level not shown)

troop_passives_active.reason: defender is FC1 - not unlocked (FC5 gate)

notes: REGIME PAIR battle 2/2 (with 20260718_162413): only difference from battle 1 is Vulcanus on the defender. Outcome flips: the Vulcanus-led T6 MM kills the Gatot T1 Infantry in 6 turns where the naked T6 MM dealt no visible damage in 150.
Replicates E-NIF R12 (Vulcanus-led T6 MM vs Mueller Gatot T1 Inf = 6 turns) - independent confirmation.
Vulcanus S3=2 at T=6 is phase-3 consistent (procs turns 3 and 6).

Martin's checked correction of pressure-test 'battle A': 6 turns, not the earlier verbal 4. NOTE this is a 1v1; the original verbal report described 3x T6 MM dealers - the 3-dealer battle (the sqrt-N pooling-order discriminator) is NOT this battle and remains unrun/uncaptured.
kills read from Battle Details rows (defender 1 / attacker 0), cross-checked by the casualty identity.
